scripts.build:theme: cd Storybook && npm run build:theme && mv theme-build/index.d.mts theme-build/index.d.ts 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.pipeline: npm run build:theme && npm run deliver:theme
scripts.demo:trace: npx playwright test e2e/form-flow.spec.ts && npx playwright show-trace test-results/*/trace.zip
